case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-06-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-06-2026 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75056756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75693619), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED JAN-20-2025, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JAN-30-2025 AS TO DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-07-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75776369) AS TO DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 76167469) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $477.14 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 77006766) AS TO DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77006766) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEYS FEES, INTEREST, AND COSTS IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77006766) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77006766) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 1 EXEMPLIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75056756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-19-2025
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75056756) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D.N.D PRIORITIES LLC AKA DND PRIORITIES LLC $13,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,787.76 INTEREST, $477.14 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,939.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
